library_preparation_preflight.summary: No extra Maven dependency, Docker service, environment variable, or system property is required; the 2.0.0 artifact already resolves its Maven SCM API/git commons dependencies, and the observed javac failure is from API changes in the tests rather than missing setup.
risks: Version 2.0.0 removed org.apache.maven.scm.log.DefaultLog usage from relevant consumers; tests should adapt to the new constructors instead of adding an older maven-scm-api dependency.
GitRemoteInfoCommand.createCommandLine is an instance method in 2.0.0 and requires constructing GitRemoteInfoCommand with an environment map.
Tests that execute real git commands depend on a git executable on PATH; ubuntu-latest normally provides this, and command-construction/consumer coverage can avoid network or service setup.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8307 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.apache.maven.scm:maven-scm-provider-gitexe:2.0.0; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015
